ideation: This sequence mimics the act of cutting and enjoying a juicy watermelon.  The animation starts with both arms relaxed, then moves to a slicing motion, followed by bringing the hands up as if holding a slice, and finally, a gesture of satisfaction. The left arm will primarily perform the cutting action, while the right arm will be used for support and the final enjoying gesture.  I'll use the two joints and wrist to create a natural-looking sequence avoiding stiff movements.

frames.beat: arms hang loose, ready for a treat
left arm slices down, right arm steadies
arms lift a juicy slice to enjoy
a satisfied bite, arms relax again
